input.user_input: Add a choice of law clause to this services agreement. It currently has none. Use Delaware law.

actual:
It appears you haven't uploaded or attached the services agreement yet. 

If you upload the document, I can add the clause directly into the text for you. In the meantime, here is a standard Delaware choice of law clause that you can insert into your agreement's "Miscellaneous" or "General" section:

**Governing Law.** This Agreement and all matters arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without giving effect to any conflict of laws principles that would require the application of the laws of a different jurisdiction.

Please upload the agreement if you would like me to edit it directly!
